observation.new_content:
model: StaffMember
slug: staff_members
table: staff_members

options:
  belongs_to_organization: true
  soft_deletes: false
  audit_trail: false
  pagination: true
  per_page: 25

columns:
  name:
    type: string
    nullable: false
    searchable: true
  email:
    type: string
    nullable: true
    searchable: true
  role_title:
    type: string
    nullable: true

relationships:
  - type: belongsTo
    model: Organization
  - type: hasMany
    model: TimeSlot

permissions:
  owner:
    actions: [index, show, store, update, destroy]
    show_fields: "*"
    create_fields: "*"
    update_fields: "*"
  admin:
    actions: [index, show, store, update, destroy]
    show_fields: "*"
    create_fields: "*"
    update_fields: "*"
  staff:
    actions: [index, show]
    show_fields: "*"
    create_fields: []
    update_fields: []
  customer:
    actions: []
    show_fields: []
    create_fields: []
    update_fields: []
